brief.title: Founder App Idea
brief.source_text:
Founder App Idea

I want a tool that helps solo founders turn scattered notes into a cleaner execution plan.
Maybe start as a web app, but keep the first version local-first and simple.

Goals:
- Help founders clean up rough product ideas
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a minimal delivery pack they can review locally

Non-Goals:
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

Constraints:
- Budget under $15k
- Need something usable in 4 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer

Notes:
- I care more about speed than polish for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes

artifacts.name: brief.md
artifacts.content:
# Stage 2 Deterministic Draft: Brief

Title: Founder App Idea
Product Type: web app
Audience: founders

## Summary
Founder App Idea is a web app aimed at founders. Primary goal: Help founders clean up rough product ideas.

## Explicit User Input
- Help founders clean up rough product ideas
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a minimal delivery pack they can review locally
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet
- Budget under $15k
- Need something usable in 4 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer
- Maybe start as a web app, but keep the first version local-first and simple

## Inferred Structure
- Inferred product type: web app.
- Inferred platform hints: local-first, web.

## Unresolved Questions
- How will the team know the first release is successful?

## Notes
- I care more about speed than polish for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes

## References
- https://example.com/founder-notes

## Source Text
```text
Founder App Idea

I want a tool that helps solo founders turn scattered notes into a cleaner execution plan.
Maybe start as a web app, but keep the first version local-first and simple.

Goals:
- Help founders clean up rough product ideas
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a minimal delivery pack they can review locally

Non-Goals:
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

Constraints:
- Budget under $15k
- Need something usable in 4 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer

Notes:
- I care more about speed than polish for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes
```

artifacts.content:
# Stage 2 Deterministic Draft: Scope

## Goals
- Help founders clean up rough product ideas
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a minimal delivery pack they can review locally

## Non-Goals
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

## Scope Draft
- Shape the first scoped draft around a web app.
- Prioritize the needs of founders.
- Support goal: Help founders clean up rough product ideas.
- Support goal: Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers.
- Support goal: Produce a minimal delivery pack they can review locally.
- Keep out of scope for now: No cloud sync.
- Keep out of scope for now: Don't build team collaboration yet.
- Respect platform hints: local-first, web.

## First Step Recommendation
Resolve the top unresolved question before expanding scope: How will the team know the first release is successful?

# Stage 2 Deterministic Draft: MVP Cut Plan

## Recommended MVP Cut
- Anchor the first release on this primary goal: Help founders clean up rough product ideas
- Defer secondary goals until the first workflow is validated.
- Choose one primary platform instead of splitting across: local-first, web.
